backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend data types (StressReading, MoodEntry, SleepEntry, etc.) and per-user data storage using a Map, with mixins for blob storage and authorization. Provides CRUD endpoints for stress readings, breathing sessions, mood entries, sleep entries, vibration commands, reminders, and user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Privacy Dashboard, account deletion flow, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each page, component, and public asset in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the TRANQUIL design system's light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the TRANQUIL app with PWA manifest link, iOS home screen meta tags, theme-color, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for TRANQUIL declaring app name, standalone display mode, portrait orientation, theme/background colors, and 192×512 px icons for PWA installation.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy for static app shell assets while bypassing all ICP canister API calls, with install/activate lifecycle handlers for cache versioning.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster, and implements an AuthGuard handling login state, terms acceptance, and first-time profile setup modals.
frontend/src/components/AvatarSelector.t: Reusable avatar picker component rendering a 6-item grid of emoji avatars with color-coded selection highlighting, exposing a callback for the selected avatar ID.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar with five route links (Home, Breathe, Sounds, Journal, Analytics) using TanStack Router, highlighting the active route.
Displays an animated circle that scales and changes color based on the current breathing phase (inhale, hold, exhale, etc.) and phase progress.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountMod: A confirmation dialog that requires the user to type 'DELETE' before scheduling permanent account deletion, then clears the session and query cache on success.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCalmBut: A styled button with a lightning-bolt icon that triggers an emergency calm mode when clicked.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCalmOve: A full-screen overlay that runs a 60-second guided calm routine through breathing, body scan, and affirmation phases, logging the session on completion.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header displaying the Tranquil logo and navigation buttons for AI Tips, user profile (with avatar emoji), and settings.
A labeled slider component (1–5) for selecting intensity, with color-coded dot indicators and a badge showing the current intensity label.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, scrollable main content area via TanStack Router's Outlet, and BottomNav within a max-width container.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page showcasing app features and a 'Get Started' button that triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/MoodSelector.tsx: Renders a row of five mood buttons (Great to Stressed) with emoji and color highlighting for the currently selected mood.
frontend/src/components/PolicyModal.tsx: A modal dialog component that displays either the Privacy Policy or Terms of Service content in a scrollable area, with hardcoded policy text covering data collection, storage, user rights, and compliance.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for new users to set up their TRANQUIL profile by selecting an avatar and entering a name, which is then saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileStats.tsx: A display component that renders a three-column grid of user profile statistics: total breathing sessions, average weekly stress score, and total mood entries.
frontend/src/components/ReminderToggle.t: A simple toggle row component combining an emoji, label, and Switch control for enabling or disabling a named reminder setting.
frontend/src/components/SoundTile.tsx: A button tile component for ambient sound selection that shows an emoji, title, and an animated sound-wave indicator when the sound is actively playing.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: An interactive 1–5 star rating component with hover highlighting and click-to-select behavior using Lucide Star icons.
frontend/src/components/StressChart.tsx: A Recharts bar chart component that visualizes daily stress data with color-coded bars (green/purple/red) based on stress level, including a legend.
frontend/src/components/StressGauge.tsx: An SVG circular gauge component that displays a stress score (0–100) with color-coded progress arc and glow effects based on low, medium, or high stress level.
frontend/src/components/TermsAcceptanceM: A blocking modal that presents a summary of data collection, privacy, and compliance information, requiring the user to check a checkbox and confirm before proceeding via the useRecordTermsAcceptance mutation.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: A card component that renders a wellness tip with a category-specific emoji, color accent, title, description, and category badge.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: A React context provider that manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: Manages audio playback state for both remote tracks (by ID) and local file tracks, handling play/pause toggling and object URL lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useBreathingTimer.ts: Implements a configurable breathing exercise timer that cycles through inhale, hold, exhale, and holdOut phases with progress tracking, supporting start, pause, resume, and reset controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalmRoutine.ts: Runs a 60-second guided calm routine that progresses through breathing, body scan, and affirmation phases, tracking elapsed time and per-phase progress via a 100ms interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profile CRUD, stress readings, breathing sessions, and other app data, wrapping the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useStressSimulation.t: Simulates fluctuating biometric sensor data (heart rate, skin temperature, motion) on a 2.5-second interval and persists stress readings to the backend every 30 seconds when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Nunito, Quicksand), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including stress level colors, jewel-tone accents, chart colors, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page that displays weekly stress data as a chart with daily averages, an improvement message, and a scrollable list of recent individual readings each with an inline delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Breathe.tsx: Breathing exercise page that lets users select from predefined breathing techniques, runs an animated timer session, and saves completed sessions to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing a personalized greeting, a live stress gauge with simulated sensor data (heart rate, skin temperature, motion), and quick-action shortcuts including an emergency calm overlay.
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx: Mood journal page that allows users to select a mood, optionally add a note, submit the entry to the backend, and view a reverse-chronological list of this week's past mood entries.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Privacy & Data settings page that lets users toggle analytics/AI preferences, clear analytics history or device pairings, view data counts, and delete their account via a modal.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page displaying and allowing inline editing of the user's name and avatar, showing principal ID, profile stats, and a logout button.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page providing theme toggling, reminder preference controls, and data export functionality in JSON, CSV, or PDF formats, plus links to policy modals.
frontend/src/pages/SleepTracking.tsx: Sleep tracking page where users log bedtime, wake time, and quality rating, then view a list of recent sleep entries with computed durations and quality labels.
frontend/src/pages/Sounds.tsx: Ambient sounds page offering a grid of nature sound tiles and a local audio file uploader, with play/pause controls managed via the useAudioPlayer hook.
frontend/src/pages/TipsAndReminders.tsx: React page that displays AI-generated wellness tips and toggleable smart reminders (hydration, breaks, stretch), fetching data via custom hooks and persisting reminder preferences to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/VibrationControl.tsx: React page for selecting vibration patterns and intensity for a simulated wristband, sending commands to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/utils/dataExport.ts: Utility module providing functions to export user wellness data as JSON, CSV, or an HTML/PDF report with stress readings, mood entries, and session summaries.
frontend/src/utils/errorHandling.ts: Utility that maps backend errors to user-facing toast notifications, handling unauthorized, not-found, and generic error cases.
frontend/src/utils/sleepCalculations.ts: Utility functions for computing sleep duration from bedtime/wake-time strings, formatting durations, and converting time strings to nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/stressAnalytics.ts: Utility module that computes daily average stress scores from readings over the past 7 days and generates a human-readable improvement message based on recent vs. older stress trends.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an extended color palette (including tranquil-themed colors using OKLCH), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for the app.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall state of the TRANQUIL mobile app project, including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a registry of existing implemented features with their requirements and versions.
